🏫 House-hunting with kids? In the Indy suburbs, the school district usually comes first — and for good reason. Our 2026 guide breaks down the metro's most sought-after districts, from Carmel Clay to Center Grove, and how to make sure the home you buy is actually inside the boundary you want.

Read it on IndyPropertyGuide.com 👇
#IndyRealEstate #IndianapolisSchools #CentralIndiana

⛳ Dreaming of a home on the fairway? Central Indiana has some of the Midwest's best golf-course living — from a Pete Dye showpiece in Zionsville to a Jack Nicklaus Signature course in Noblesville. Our new guide profiles the standout luxury golf communities around Indianapolis.

Read it on IndyPropertyGuide.com 👇
#IndyRealEstate #GolfCommunities #LuxuryHomes

🏛️ Cobblestone streets, restored Victorians, and a walk-everywhere lifestyle — some of Indy's most distinctive homes aren't in the suburbs at all. Our new guide tours downtown Indianapolis's historic neighborhoods, from Mass Ave to Lockerbie Square.

Read it on IndyPropertyGuide.com 👇
#IndyRealEstate #DowntownIndy #HistoricHomes

The right school district can shape your home search — and your home's future value. 🎓 We just published a local broker's 2026 guide to the best school districts in the Indianapolis suburbs: Carmel Clay, Hamilton Southeastern, Zionsville, Center Grove, Brownsburg, Avon and more.

Full guide on IndyPropertyGuide.com 👇
#IndianapolisRealEstate #SchoolDistricts #YourRealtyLink

🌳 Tired of mowing the lawn and cleaning rooms you never use? 55+ active adult communities near Indianapolis offer low-maintenance homes, built-in community, and amenities designed for the way you want to live now. Our new guide shows where to find them.
